item.title: INFRA: Settings Screen
item.intent: Minimal but essential — the single place users configure auto-format rules, spell check, AI behavior, theme, and font.
item.description: SwiftUI settings view accessible via gear icon in toolbar. Sections: Appearance (theme, font, font size), Editor (auto-format toggles per rule, spell check toggle, trailing whitespace behavior), AI (ghost text on/off, model management — download/delete), About (version, licenses, support link). Persists via UserDefaults (no sidecar files per DP-1). Opinionated defaults — settings exist to turn things OFF, not to configure complexity.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings screen opens from gear icon in toolbar
Toggling an auto-format rule takes effect immediately in the editor
All settings persist across app launches
VoiceOver can navigate and toggle every setting
Settings screen renders correctly at all Dynamic Type sizes
